title: Dragon Ball Super Star Teases New Goku vs. Frieza Fight
content: Dragon Ball Super is the latest entry in the franchise, based on Akira Toriyama’s original creation, and it continues to elevate the legendary creator’s work to new heights. Ever since the major announcement that Super would be expanded with the Galactic Patrol Prisoner saga, adapting the manga at the franchise’s 40th…
author: ComicBook

title: Dragon Ball Super Exec Explains Why New Anime Remake Was Needed
content: At the major event for Dragon Ball’ s 40th anniversary, it was announced that the series’ latest canon entry, Dragon Ball Super , will be getting an expansion with a new arc being adapted, along with an intriguing project, a remake of the events of the Battle of Gods arc from the series.
author: ComicBook

title: Will Gets a Sword in Wistoria: Wand and Sword Season 2 Episode 3 Preview
content: Wistoria: Wand and Sword Season 2 has revealed the preview images and synopsis for Episode 3 (Episode 15 overall). Crunchyroll is streaming the anime worldwide, with Episode 3 scheduled for an April 26 release.
author: Anime Corner

title: 2nd Kingdom Stage Play Casts Chihiro Yamamoto
content: The staff for Kingdom II -Keishō- (Kingdom II -Inheritance-), the second stage play adaptation of Yasuhisa Hara 's Kingdom manga, announced on Tuesday that Chihiro Yamamoto will play Kyou Kai. Hiroki Miura and Akira Takano reprise their roles as Shin and Yuichiro Yamaguchi as Ou Ki (Wang Qi).
author: ANN

title: MARRIAGETOXIN Reveals Episode 3 Preview
content: MARRIAGETOXIN anime revealed the Episode 3 preview images and synopsis, ahead of the episode’s April 21 release. Studio BONES Film is handling the animation production, which premiered on April 3 . The upcoming episode will conclude the Water Master Arc . Crunchyroll is streaming the anime.
author: Anime Corner

title: Former Chainsaw Man Editor Announces New Manga Platform
content: Former Shueisha editor Shihei Lin announced on X (formerly Twitter ) on Friday the launch of his company Mix Green's new manga platform, which is now accepting manga submissions from artists. Lin joined Shueisha as an editor in 2006 and worked there until his departure in August 2022.
author: ANN

title: Pragmata Game Sells Over 1 Million Units Worldwide in 1st 2 Days
content: The science-fiction action-adventure game launched for Nintendo Switch 2, PlayStation 5, Xbox Series X|S, and PC via Steam on April 17, one week earlier than the planned April 24 date. The game has a demo available now for all four platforms. CAPCOM delayed the game's release in June 2025.
author: ANN

title: Beast of Reincarnation Game Streams Pre-Order Trailer
content: GAME FREAK ( Pokémon ) streamed a new trailer for its Beast of Reincarnation game on Monday, announcing that the game is available for pre-order. The video reveals pre-order bonuses, including the Brown Shiba skin for regular pre-orders and a Black Shiba skin, Oni's Hat, and Big Dipper Sword for pre-orders of the…
author: ANN

title: The Klutzy Class Monitor and the Girl with the Short Skirt, Liar Game Anime Reveal English Dub Cast, Apri 20 Premiere
content: Crunchyroll begins streaming the English dubs for the television anime of Takuma Yokota 's Ponkotsu Fūkiin to Skirt Take ga Futekisetsu na JK no Hanashi (Story of the Useless Public Morals Committeeman and the High School Girl With Inappropriate Skirt Length) manga and the television anime of Shinobu Kaitani 's Liar…
author: ANN

title: Kirio Fan Club Anime Reveals 2 New Cast Members
content: The anime premiered on April 2 at 24:26 (effectively, April 3 at 12:26 a.m.) JST in the Super Animeism TURBO programming block on MBS , TBS , and 26 affiliated channels. It also runs on the AT-X channel. HIDIVE is streaming the anime as it airs.
author: ANN
